projectDescription: A family companion app that helps parents and children manage daily tasks, track milestones, practice mindfulness, and capture memories together.
keyFeatures: 5-step guided onboarding for parent and child personalization
Parent dashboard with mood tracking and AI guide (Lumis, Sage, Nova, River)
Child quest system with star rewards and parent approval workflow
Virtual companion/pet that grows as tasks are completed
Mindfulness and calm activities for both parent and child
Shared memory keeper to capture and categorize family moments
Calendar view with weekly events and lunch planner
Customizable themes with preset and custom color pickers
Configurable approval windows and notification preferences
Offline-capable Progressive Web App (PWA) installable on any device
publicApiSurface: Onboarding flow (5 steps: names, app name, AI guide, companion, theme)
Parent profile: Home, Calendar, Calm, Settings, Memories tabs
Child profile: Quests, Calm, Memories tabs
Task approval workflow: parent approves child-completed tasks
Star reward system: stars earned per approved task
Screen time tracking: minutes unlocked via task completion
Pet/companion progression: grows with task completions (5 stages)
Memory keeper: add, categorize, filter moments
Mindfulness sessions: breathing exercises, body scans, guided meditations
Theme customization: 6 presets + custom primary/accent color pickers
Approval window settings: Morning, Midday, Evening, Anytime, Custom
Notification preferences: Push, In-app, Email digest, Silent
